jobs.title: ERP Support Officer (Dynamics 365) Job (100-150K)
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Corporate Staffing Services is recruiting an ERP Support Officer (Dynamics 365) position. The salary for the role is Ksh 80,000 – 100,000 monthly. Proficiency in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central, user support, and Power BI is required.
requirements: Diploma or Bachelor’s Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field.
3 years’ experiencein IT application support or systems support.
Basic knowledge of Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central.
Exposure to Microsoft 365, Power BI, or Power Automate will be an added advantage.
Good analytical and problem-solving skills.

jobs.title: Software Engineer (Angular / Front-End Focus) Job Tropical Heat

responsibilities: Develop responsive web applications using Angular and related technologies
Collaborate on design and UX decisions to deliver clean, intuitive interfaces
Integrate front-end components with backend APIs and databases
Participate in code reviews, testing, and continuous improvement of development processes
Translate business requirements into scalable, maintainable software solutions
Support deployment, debugging, and optimisation across environments
requirements: 3+ years of hands-on experience in Angular, HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript/TypeScript
Proven ability to connect and consume RESTful APIs or similar backend services
Strong understanding of responsive design, UI/UX principles, and modern frameworks
Experience with version control (Git) and team-based workflows
Good communication and problem-solving skills; attention to detail is key

jobs.title: Senior .NET Engineer (Platform Team) Job Cigna

Own services end-to-end: architecture, development, testing, deployment, and monitoring
Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines and automated deployment processes
Implement and manage Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) for application and environment provisioning
Work extensively with on-premises Windows Server environments, including deployment and runtime management on virtual machines

jobs.title: Software Developer Job Medbook
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Medbook is recruiting a Software Developer position. Proficiency in full-stack development (Laravel, Angular, Flutter), SQL databases, and REST APIs is required.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain features across Laravel, Angular/TypeScript, and Flutter; build and document
REST APIs across AphiaOne, Mediclaim, Mediwrite, and the AphiaApp
Work with payment and messaging integrations (M-Pesa/Daraja, SMS gateways) and third-party
Apply secure-coding and data-protection practices in line with Kenya’s Data Protection Act, 2019
Contribute to CI/CD deployments, code review, and our growing analytics and AI-assisted tooling
Collaborate with product, operations, and support to ship reliably and resolve issues
jobs.howToApply: Send your CV, a short note on why this role interests you, toinfo@medbookafrica.comby Friday 24 July 2026. Please use the subject line “Software Developer application”. Medbook never asks for payment at any stage of recruitment. Anyone requesting money on our behalf is not from us.

jobs.title: Information Systems Auditor Job Madison Group
jobs.description: Looking for an IT  job in Kenya? Madison Group is recruiting an Information Systems Auditor position. Proficiency in IS auditing, CISA certification, and risk management is required.
responsibilities: Assist in key risk identification and assessment and in preparation of the IS audits annual Plan in liaison with the Head of Department.
Preparing detailed IS Audit planning memoranda, audit programs and procedures for each IS audit assignment.
Execute IS audit assignments and document well referenced working papers and evidence for each IS audit assignment in accordance with IS audit standards and best practice.
Evaluate the adequacy and effectiveness of controls for information systems and technology processes, including those related to data protection, change management, and cyber security.
Prepare and present written and oral reports and other technical information in a pertinent, concise, and accurate manner for distribution to management.
Perform audit follow-up and tracking of open audit findings to ensure that audit findings are closed within the agreed timelines.
requirements: Bachelor’s Degree from a recognized University preferably in Computer Science, Business Information Technology or a related field.
Professional Qualifications: Certified Information Systems Auditor (CISA) or Certified Information Security Manager (CISM) is required, CIA will be an added advantage;
At least 2-4 years relevant experience in in internal or external audit preferably in the Insurance or the Financial services industry.
Excellent Computer skills with hands on experience in Excel and Audit Software (e.g. ACL, Case Ware IDEA, SQL).
jobs.howToApply: Qualified candidates are requested to forward their applications including comprehensive C.Vs to the Group Human Resources Manager through Email:hr_recruitment@madison.co.kewith the Role as theSubjectof the email and not later than 22nd July , 2026.

jobs.title: CRRD Data Analyst NGO Job IRC
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? International Rescue Committee is hiring a CRRD Data Analyst to analyze program data, support monitoring and evaluation,and provide insights for informed decision-making. The role is based in Nairobi and experience in international humanitarian aid or development is required.
responsibilities: Data Analysis & Reporting:Create and maintain dashboards, visualizations, and reports to track program and strategy performance, pulling from grants, finance, and program data from across IRC’s core business systems (systems are called Integra, OTIS, Salesforce, and PID)Analyze and interpret large datasets to uncover trends, patterns, and insights that inform global program strategies.
Stakeholder Collaboration:Work closely with cross-functional teams (e.g., programs, fundraising, marketing, and finance) to ensure data is well represented to meet stakeholder needs

Process Improvement & Innovation:When relevant, identify opportunities to enhance the data collection and reporting processes, ensuring accuracy, efficiency, and alignment with global goals.Keep abreast of industry trends and emerging analytics tools, and bring innovative ideas for improving the team’s capabilities.Collaborate with fellow Analytics colleagues to ensure best practices in coding, statistics, and general analysis.
requirements: 3+ years working in the field of data analytics.
2+ years’ experience in international humanitarian aid or development

Proven experience with enterprise data sets, including technical skills across the data stack: cloud lakehouse platforms (Databricks preferred), Python and SQL, dbt or equivalent transformation tooling, pipeline orchestration, and BI/visualization tools (e.g. Power BI, Tableau)
Demonstrable experience planning and executing complex analytics projects across multiple stakeholders.

jobs.title: Integration Engineer Job HFCB
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? HFCB Group is hiring an Integration Engineer skilled in API development, system integration, and microservices architecture.
responsibilities: Designing Integration Architecture: Analyze business requirements to create integration solutions using the ESB that are scalable, reliable and re-usable.
Development of Integration Solutions: Build and configure APIs and messaging components to facilitate communication between systems that are secure, compliant and optimized for performance.

System Connectivity: Work closely with other stakeholders within the Bank and other partners to ensure reliable system connectivity example IT-Security, IT Infrastructure and external parties like KRA, IPRS, Safaricom, IPSL and the various B2B partners working with the Bank.

Security and Compliance: Ensure data flowing through the ESB adheres to organizational and regulatory security standards (e.g., encryption, authentication, and authorization) and also Implement compliance requirements such as GDPR, PCI DSS, or AML for data handling and communication protocols.
Continuous Improvement and Optimization: Optimize integration processes for performance and scalability and enhance existing integration components to improve maintainability and reduce costs.

Collaboration: Work closely with developers, architects, and business analysts to understand requirements and deliver integration solutions, collaborate with DevOps and IT operations teams to deploy and maintain ESB solutions and Liaise with vendors and third-party service providers to integrate external systems or troubleshoot integration issues.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field
Experience in ESB/SOA technologies e.g. Apache Camel, IBM App Connect, Tibco, Oracle SOA, Tibco EMS, Apache Active MQ, Rabbit MQ, Kafka, ISO-8583, ISO20022, REST JSON, SOAP/XML
Proven experience working in a fast-paced integration environment, preferably within the banking or financial services sector.
Experience in documenting ESB services, including the ability to write comprehensive Service Mapping Documents (SMD) and Service Design Documents (SDD).
Experience in working with API Gateways such as WSO2, Apigee, and IBM API Connect, including configuration, deployment, and lifecycle management of APIs.
jobs.howToApply: Click here to apply

jobs.title: ICT Risk Officer Job Co-operative Bank
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Co-operative Bank of Kenya is hiring an ICT Risk Officer to assess technology risks, strengthen IT controls and support cybersecurity initiatives. The role is based in Nairobi and experience in implementing information security standard is required.
responsibilities: Carry out ICT risk assessments of Co-operative Bank systems and provide recommendation of appropriate and adequate IT security controls to mitigate and minimize ICT Risks.
Continuously review and improve the ICT controls in place.
Continuously review systems at all levels i.e. servers, applications, database, network devices etc., identify risks and make recommendations on closure of the risks.
Provide continuous assurance on ICT Risks on the Bank’s systems.

Evaluate ICT controls for all operating systems, applications, database management system interfaces and networks across the Bank to ensure consistency in achieving compliance requirements (regulatory, standards and internal policies).
Promote Information Security awareness within the Bank by providing consultation, guidance and conducting relevant awareness programs to ensure an IS compliant culture.
requirements: A Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Security or Computer Science.
Relevant IT Security professional qualifications e.g. CISA, CISM, CEH or other relevant security certifications.
A minimum of 5 years working experience in a similar role in a highly computerized environment.
Experience in implementing Information Security Standards such as ISO 27001, COBIT.
Understanding of ICT risk and systems security control processes.
jobs.howToApply: Click here to apply

jobs.title: Manager, IT Security Job CIB
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? CIB Kenya is hiring a Manager, IT Security based in Nairobi, skilled in cybersecurity frameworks, infrastructure defense, incident response, and risk assessment.
responsibilities: Build the security infrastructure architecture to help manage, operate, maintain, and monitor adherence to IT Security architecture and system wide policies.
Oversee the development and management of security controls, defenses and countermeasures to prevent and safeguard the security, integrity, and confidentiality of all corporate and customer data.

Ensure annual regulatory and compliance needs are met and respond to audit requests for information related to IT security, on application, data, network, Services, endpoint, and servers, in order to ensure effective controls according to business/compliance/regulation requirements.
Participate and recommend improvements to policies, processes and procedures and manage their implementation to ensure all relevant procedural / legislative requirements are fulfilled.

Supervise the day-to-day operations of the IT Security team by providing guidance in the related area, encouraging teamwork, and facilitating related professional work processes in order to achieve high performance standards.
requirements: Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP)
Certified Information Systems Auditor (CISA)
Security frameworks and best practices (e.g., PCI, ISO27K, NIST
Information Technology Infrastructure Library (ITIL)

jobs.title: Senior Manager, IT Infrastructure Job DIBBKE
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? DIBBKE is hiring a Senior Manager, IT Infrastructure to monitor IT systems and ensure infrastructure availability, resolve operational issues. The role is based in Nairobi and professional certifications are required.
requirements: At least 10 years of progressive IT infrastructure experience, with 5 years in a senior managerial role.
Proven experience in managing enterprise infrastructure in banking/financial services or large corporate environments.

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Information Security Job DIBBKE
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? DIBBKE is hiring a Senior Manager, Information Security to monitor IT systems and ensure infrastructure availability, resolve operational issues. The role is based in Nairobi and professional certifications are required.
responsibilities: Design and maintain regular security processes to measure and improve the security posture of the bank and / or the 3rd Party Vendors.
Design and implement Detailed and Executive Summary Dashboards reflecting the accurate status of the security controls for the bank and / or the 3rd party Vendors.
Assess the security and technology proposals to deliver secure platforms to serve the business requirements.
Help to assess and approve the technology proposals to deliver secure platforms to serve the business requirements in DIBK.
Report and, Follow-up to remediate or mitigate the security gaps based on severity.
Coordinate with the Data Governances, SOC and Information Security whenever applicable.
requirements: Minimum 6 years of experience on Administration and / or Security of different Databases and Operating Systems

jobs.title: Solutions Architect Job DIBBKE
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? DIBBKE is hiring a Solutions Architect to monitor IT systems and ensure infrastructure availability, resolve operational issues. The role is based in Nairobi and professional certifications are required.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain solution architecture standards, guidelines, and reference models to ensure consistency and quality across all IT initiatives.
Review and validate solution designs from project teams to ensure alignment with business requirements, architectural principles, and future-state technology direction.
Produce system design documents, integration diagrams, data flows, and technical specifications to support new and existing solutions.
Ensure architectural decisions support scalability, resilience, security, and cost-effectiveness.
requirements: Progressive experience (6–10+ years) in solution architecture, systems design, application development, or infrastructure engineering within a banking or large enterprise environment.
Strong background in designing and supporting enterprise systems, integrations, APIs, and middleware.
Proven experience collaborating with application support, system administration, and project delivery teams.
Hands-on exposure to core banking platforms, digital channels, payments systems, and related financial services technologies.
Demonstrated experience conducting technical reviews, architectural assessments, and project risk evaluations.

jobs.title: Junior Application & Data Security Engineer Job Solutech
jobs.description: Looking for a technology job in Kenya? Solutech is recruiting a Junior Application & Data Security Engineer position . Proficiency in cybersecurity, vulnerability assessments, and security compliance is required.
responsibilities: Assist in implementing and monitoring security controls under supervision
Support vulnerability scanning, assessments, and basic risk identification
Assist in security audits, DPIAs, compliance, and documentation updates
Support incident reporting and basic incident response activities
Collaborate with development and operations teams on DevSecOps and secure coding practices
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Security, or related field is relevant
Cybersecurity work experience 1-3 years
Certifications such as CompTIA Security+, eCPPT, eJPT, PNPT, GIAC, S-DPP are a plus.communication, and teamwork skills
Exposure to cybersecurity labs, projects, or tools is an added advantage
Exposure to System audit and ISO27001 and similar standard implementations  is an added advantage

jobs.title: ServiceNow System Administrator NGO Job IRC
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? International Rescue Committee is hiring a serviceNow system to administrator to support system users,and optimize IT service management processes. The role is based in Nairobi and ServiceNow Certified System Administrator certification required.
responsibilities: Provide Tier 1 and Tier 2 end-user support for ServiceNow-related incidents, requests, access issues, reporting questions, catalog items, and basic configuration issues; escalate complex issues to the Senior System Administrator as needed.
Administer and maintain core ServiceNow platform components, including users, groups, roles, assignment groups, forms, lists, tables, reports, dashboards, notifications, and knowledge articles.
Configure and maintain ServiceNow solutions across core modules, including Incident, Problem, Change, Service Catalog, Request Management, and Knowledge Management.
Support configuration and enhancement of catalog items, record producers, workflows, approvals, forms, reports, dashboards, and automation using ServiceNow configuration tools and Flow Designer.

Assist with ServiceNow scripting and platform customizations, including Business Rules, Client Scripts, UI Policies, UI Actions, Script Includes, scheduled jobs, and notifications, under the technical direction of the Senior System Administrator.

Support, maintain, test, and troubleshoot ServiceNow integrations with other enterprise systems under the guidance of the Senior System Administrator, using approved integration methods such as REST/SOAP APIs and IntegrationHub where applicable.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Systems, or a related field, or equivalent professional experience.
Minimum of 3 years of hands-on experience with ServiceNow administration.
ServiceNow Certified System Administrator certification required.
Experience supporting core ServiceNow modules such as Incident, Problem, Change, Service Catalog, Request Management, and Knowledge Management.
Experience with user administration, group management, role assignments, access support, and basic security administration.
jobs.howToApply: Click here to apply

jobs.title: Information Systems Audit Manager Job Prime Bank
jobs.description: Looking for an auditing job in Kenya? Prime Bank is recruiting an Information Systems Audit Manager position. Proficiency in IT audit, cybersecurity, and CISA certification is required.
responsibilities: Develop and execute risk-based IT audit plans.
Review core banking systems, payment platforms and IT infrastructure controls.
Conduct vulnerability assessments and penetration tests.
Assess cybersecurity controls, access management and incident response.
Evaluate IT governance, policies, and regulatory compliance.
Evaluate vendor management processes, including IT service provider oversight, contract compliance, and SLA performance.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, or related field.
CISA certification (mandatory); CISM, CEH, or ISO 27001 Lead Auditor an advantage.
5+ years’ experience in IS audit, risk, forensics and security preferably in banking.
jobs.howToApply: Submit your CV, together with a Cover Letter (maximum one page), tojobs@primebank.co.keby end ofTuesday, 14th July 2026

jobs.title: IT Manager NGO Job Trees for the Future
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Trees for the Future is hiring an IT Manager in Nairobi skilled in Microsoft 365 administration, vendor management, identity and access management, and cybersecurity.
responsibilities: TREES is building a dedicated internal IT function for the first time, and the Information Technology (IT) Manager will play a foundational role in shaping it.

This is a hands-on role focused on enabling staff to do their best work. The IT Manager will oversee day-to-day IT operations, including staff support, Microsoft 365, identity and access management, cybersecurity, device management, software licensing, and vendor relationships, while building the systems and standards needed to support a growing global organization.

Reporting to the Vice President of People & Culture, the IT Manager will partner closely with People Operations, managed service providers, and external technical advisors to deliver a secure, reliable, and people-centered IT experience. The role will also lead key initiatives such as the rollout of Rippling IT, SharePoint governance, AI governance, and provide day-to-day guidance to in-country IT Coordinators as TREES expands its IT presence across Kenya, Uganda, and Tanzania.
requirements: An enthusiastic advocate for TREES’ mission and values. You believe technology is a strategic enabler of impact and are excited to help build thriving rural economies, resilient food systems, and a healthier planet.

A trusted IT partner. Staff know your name not because something went wrong, but because you showed up before it did. You communicate clearly, follow through, and genuinely care about the experience of the people you support.

A builder, not just an operator. You are energized by the opportunity to bring structure to a messy environment. You don’t need a perfect starting point​,​ you build toward one. You’re comfortable being the only IT person in the room.

An M365 expert. You’ve managed SharePoint, Teams, Exchange Online, and Entra ID hands-on. You understand what good looks like for a distributed organization, and you know how to get there from where things are today.

A strong vendor manager. You’ve directed the work of an MSP or IT service provider; ​​not just submitted tickets, but held vendors accountable, navigated contract renewals, and made sure their work served your organization’s actual needs.
jobs.howToApply: Click here to apply

jobs.title: Sacco ICT Systems Officer Job Co-operative Bank
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Co-operative Bank is hiring a Sacco ICT Officer skilled in core banking systems, infrastructure, databases, and information security.
responsibilities: Managing and maintaining the SACCO’s ICT infrastructure, networks, servers, and applications.
Providing technical support to users and ensuring minimal system downtime.
Administering the Core Banking/SACCO Management System and related digital platforms.
Monitoring system performance and implementing improvements.
Managing ICT security, access controls, backups, and disaster recovery procedures.
Maintaining network equipment, firewalls, routers, switches, and internet connectivity.
requirements: Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Information Systems, or a related field.
Professional ICT certifications such as CCNA, CCNP, CISA, CISM, CEH, CompTIA Security+, Microsoft, or related certifications will be an added advantage.
Minimum of three (3) years’ relevant work experience in ICT systems administration, networking, or ICT support, preferably within a SACCO, microfinance institution, or banking environment.
Experience in managing Core Banking/SACCO Management Systems.
Knowledge of network administration, cybersecurity, database management, and system administration.

jobs.title: Frappe Full Stack Engineer Job ICRC
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? ICRC is hiring a Frappe Full Stack Engineer skilled in Frappe, Python, JavaScript, and ERPNext customization.
responsibilities: Designs, develops and maintains the new Protection digital ecosystem using the Frappe Framework;
Builds REST APIs and integrates external systems and services;
Designs and optimizes MariaDB database structures and queries;
Develops responsive frontend interfaces using JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and Frappe UI tools;
Creates custom DocTypes, reports, workflows, scripts, and dashboards;
Writes server-side business logic in Python;
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in IT engineering degree or equivalent. ITIL & DevOps certification is an asset;
Minimum 2 yrs experience of production Frappe development, with deep mastery of DocType metadata, workflows, permission hooks, custom report builder, RQ background jobs, scheduled events;

Minimum 3 years frontend, of which 1 yr on Frappe UI (Vue) in production. Deep Progressive Web App (PWA) / Service Workers / Background Sync experience; client-side persistence patterns; conflict UI; offline UX; Right-To-Left (RTL) layouts, i18n;
Minimum 5 yrs experience of production development in Python;
Significant experience in integrating and running complex technical solutions is mandatory;

jobs.title: Network Engineer Job Zetech University
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Zetech University is hiring a network engineer to design, maintain,and troubleshoot campus network infrastructure, The role is based in Ruiru and professional certification in networking is required.
responsibilities: Design, configure, deploy, monitor, and maintain LAN, WAN, WLAN, VPN, firewall,  routing, switching, and internet connectivity infrastructure.

Install, configure, and maintain routers, switches, wireless access points, firewalls, controllers, structured cabling, fibre links, patch panels, cabinets, UPS-backed network equipment, and related infrastructure.
Maintain network documentation including topology diagrams, IP address plans, VLAN plans, configuration records, rack layouts, cabling records, change logs, and asset registers.
Conduct regular preventive maintenance, firmware updates, configuration backups, and lifecycle reviews for network equipment.

Implement and maintain network security controls including firewall rules, VLAN  segmentation, access control lists, VPN security, intrusion prevention, secure Wi-Fi authentication, and network access controls.
Monitor network traffic, logs, alerts, and anomalies to detect performance issues, cyber threats, misuse, and unauthorised access.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Telecommunications, Electrical/Electronic Engineering, Computer Engineering, or a related field.
Professional certification in networking such as CCNA, CCNP or equivalent.
At least 3 years relevant experience.
Experience in a university, large institution, ISP, enterprise environment, data centre, or multi-site organisation will be an added advantage.
Experience supporting CCTV, access control, IP telephony, cloud services, or Enterprise Systems integration will be an added advantage.

jobs.title: Lead AI Engineer – Financial Inclusion Job M-KOPA Solar
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? M-KOPA Solar is hiring a Lead AI Engineer skilled in machine learning, predictive modeling, and credit scoring algorithms.
responsibilities: Lead two AI Ops Engineers — own their delivery, development, and day-to-day work
Prioritise efficiently — manage competing requests from multiple teams by applying a clear prioritisation framework you’ll help develop and improve
Build and ship automations and agents that measurably improve how internal teams and customer-facing staff work
Keep the AI tooling stack healthy as usage scales across 2,500+ employees
Stay current on emerging AI tools and technologies – know what’s hype and what’s actually useful
Help refine AI training for the wider organisation, including Engineering teams
requirements: We’re looking for someone with a strong technical background and product-focused. You won’t be building models – we have Data Science teams for that. You’ll be building agents, shipping automations, and leading a team that makes M-KOPA’s internal operations smarter and faster.
